message:
feat(extensions): queue and replay idle-turn actions for extension commands (bd-1kfkq)

When extensions send messages with triggerTurn: true or inject user
messages while the agent is idle (no active turn), the messages were
previously silently appended without starting a turn. Now they are
queued as PendingIdleAction items and replayed to trigger actual agent
turns.

- Add PendingIdleAction enum with CustomMessage and UserText variants
- Add extensions_turn_active flag and pending_idle_actions queue to
  AgentSession
- send_message now checks is_turn_active: if idle and trigger_turn is
  true, queues PendingIdleAction::CustomMessage instead of just appending
- send_user_message similarly queues PendingIdleAction::UserText when idle
- New execute_extension_command/execute_extension_command_with_abort methods
  that drain and replay pending idle actions
- New run_pending_idle_actions_with_abort, run_custom_message_with_abort,
  run_agent_with_prompt_message private methods
- run_with_text_and_abort and run_with_content_and_abort now wrap their
  bodies in extensions_turn_active guards
- Tests: extension_command_send_message_trigger_turn_runs_agent_turn_when_idle
  and extension_command_send_user_message_runs_agent_turn_when_idle

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
